core_offerings: Ingredient Information and Allergy Support Services
Personal Care Products Distribution and Retail

description: rompetrol is a romanian energy company engaged in refining, petrochemicals, and retail operations, as well as providing well services in the upstream sector. the company supplies fuels and related products to both individual and business clients in romania, moldova, bulgaria, georgia, and kazakhstan, and is involved in the development of energy projects through its participation in the kazakh-romanian energy investment fund. rompetrol also manages a supply chain and logistics network to support its operations and is committed to sustainability and decarbonization initiatives.

primary_naics: {'code': '336110', 'label': 'Automobile and Light Duty Motor Vehicle Manufacturing'}
description: renault commercial roumanie s.r.l., dba dacia, is a romanian automotive company engaged in the production and distribution of passenger and commercial vehicles. the company operates as a manufacturer and distributor, offering a range of vehicles and providing services such as vehicle financing, trade-in options, and maintenance contracts. dacia also offers electric and mild hybrid vehicles, participates in government programs for environmentally friendly vehicles, and maintains a network of authorized dealers and an online platform for vehicle sales. the company is part of the renault commercial group and is associated with renault.
naics_code: {'code': '336110', 'label': 'Automobile and Light Duty Motor Vehicle Manufacturing'}

description: fildas trading srl is a romanian company engaged in the import, distribution, and retail of nutritional supplements, pharmaceuticals, dermatological cosmetics, and technical-medical products. the company operates as a wholesaler, distributor, and retailer, supplying pharmaceutical products to retail locations and pharmacies through a network of logistics centers and regional warehouses. fildas trading also manages a pharmacy network under the catena brand and maintains a transport fleet for national distribution. the company is certified and serves clients across romania.

metro cash & carry romania srl, known as metro românia, is a romanian wholesale company that operates in the hospitality, restaurant, and catering sector, as well as serving independent retailers. the company supplies food and non-food products, including fresh and frozen produce, meat, dairy, beverages, and professional equipment and furniture. metro românia also provides digital services for retail operations and manages a central logistics platform for distribution and supply chain management. the company is involved in sustainability initiatives and is certified as a top employer in romania and europe.
core_offerings: Proprietary Brand Product Development and Distribution

description: valtec premium lubricants srl, dba valtec, is a romanian company specialized in the supply and distribution of lubricants and related products for the industrial and automotive sectors. the company serves clients across industries such as automotive, transport, construction, agriculture, building maintenance, health, and hospitality in central and eastern europe. in addition to its core activities, valtec operates as a distributor of hygiene and cleaning supplies, personal protective equipment, and safety products, and offers a private brand, valtec safety, for personal protective equipment. the company maintains a supply chain and logistics network to support its operations.
core_offerings: Private Brand Personal Protective Equipment Distribution

primary_naics.label: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: ecopwr is a swedish company specialized in sustainable energy solutions, focusing on products such as solar panels, power stations, solar generators, golf vehicles, spare batteries, and golf carts designed for outdoor activities, emergencies, and daily energy needs. the company emphasizes environmentally friendly and energy-efficient products with solar charging capabilities and silent operation. ecopwr serves customers in multiple languages, including english, swedish, german, norwegian, and finnish.
industry_name: All Other Miscellaneous Electrical Equipment and Component Manufacturing

description: walmart stores, inc. is an american retail corporation engaged in the operation of hypermarkets, discount department stores, grocery stores, and online retail platforms. the company offers a broad range of consumer goods, including groceries, home goods, electronics, health and wellness products, automotive supplies, pet supplies, and school and office supplies. walmart also provides business retail services, such as walmart business, and operates sam's club retail warehouses. the company is involved in logistics, transportation, and information technology, and is certified for sustainability initiatives.

dell inc., known as dell technologies, is an american technology company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of personal computers, servers, data storage devices, network switches, software, computer peripherals, and related products. the company also provides it services, including professional and lifecycle support, and operates in the cloud computing and online retailing sectors. dell technologies serves enterprise and individual customers across industries such as energy, healthcare, education, retail, telecommunications, utilities, and smart cities, with a global presence in the united states, europe, asia, and other regions.

the home depot, inc. is an american multinational home improvement retail corporation engaged in the sale of home improvement products and services. the company operates a network of big-box stores and e-commerce platforms, offering a broad range of products such as appliances, building materials, home décor, and tools, as well as providing home services including flooring installation, bathroom remodeling, and smart home installations. the home depot also operates as a contractor supply provider and maintains a distribution network through interline brands, serving customers in the united states, canada, and mexico.

decathlon se, dba decathlon, is a french company specialized in the retail of sporting goods, including clothing, sports equipment, and sportswear. the company operates a global network of stores and manages the research, design, production, logistics, and distribution of its products in-house. decathlon also develops its own brands and collaborates with pro athletes and industry partners in its design centers and r&d labs. the company is committed to sustainability and has implemented initiatives to reduce its environmental footprint.

f21 ipco, llc, known as forever 21, is an american retail company engaged in fast-fashion apparel and accessories for women, men, plus-size, and children. the company operates a direct-to-consumer business model, offering a broad range of fashion products, including clothing, shoes, accessories, and beauty items, through both physical outlets and an online platform. forever 21 serves a diverse customer base and is part of the apparel industry.

nothing,nowhere is an american music company specializing in the creation, distribution, and sale of music content, including albums, music videos, and live performances. the company also operates as a retailer of tour merchandise and provides direct-to-consumer distribution of music-related products. in addition to its core music industry activities, nothing,nowhere is involved in live performances and tours, and collaborates with music labels to support its artists.

gillette company llc is an american company engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of men's grooming products, including razors, blades, beard trimmers, and intimate shaving products. the company also operates a subscription-based service for product delivery and offers personalized razor handles. gillette serves both individual consumers and businesses in multiple countries, with a focus on sustainability through the use of eco-friendly materials and waste reduction initiatives.

primary_naics.label: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

description: coles supermarkets australia pty ltd is an australian retail company that operates a network of supermarkets and convenience stores, offering a broad range of grocery and household products. the company also provides financial services, including personal loans, credit cards, and insurance products, and manages a supply chain for its retail operations. coles is involved in store development, retail marketing, buying, and customer insights, and integrates technology and information technology to support its retail activities. the company is certified for sustainability and ethical sourcing.
industry_name: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

primary_naics.label: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

description: hy-vee, inc. is an american retail company that operates a chain of supermarkets and convenience stores. the company offers grocery shopping, online ordering, and delivery services, and provides additional retail functions such as bakeries, delicatessens, florist departments, pharmacies, wine and spirits, health clinics, fitness centers, and full-service restaurants. hy-vee also manages fuel stations with convenience stores, car washes, and offers food service options including salad bars and drive-in theatres. the company serves individual customers and businesses across multiple states in the midwest and southern united states.
core_offerings: Fitness Center and Drive-In Theatre Retail
Car Wash and Convenience Store Retail
industry_name: Supermarkets and Other Grocery Retailers (except Convenience Retailers)

primary_naics.label: Cut and Sew Apparel Manufacturing (except Contractors)

description: christian dior se is a french multinational luxury goods company engaged in the design, production, and distribution of fashion and beauty products. the company operates in the luxury goods industry, offering a range of products including handbags, ready-to-wear, jewelry, watches, haute couture, fragrances, makeup, skincare, and home goods. dior also manages a global network of boutiques and spas, including dior spa, which provides luxury wellness retreats and services. the company serves both individual consumers and businesses in multiple regions, including europe, north america, south america, the middle east, and asia pacific. dior is publicly traded on euronext paris and is part of the cac all-share index.
core_offerings: Makeup and Skincare Product Development and Production
Perfume and Fragrance Development and Production
Luxury Fashion Product Design and Manufacturing
industry_name: Cut and Sew Apparel Manufacturing (except Contractors)

description: m.h. alshaya co. w.l.l., known as h&m home, is a kuwaiti company engaged in the design, production, and retail of home goods, including clothing, home decor, beauty products, and home furniture. the company operates primarily in the uae, egypt, and saudi arabia, serving a diverse customer base that includes women, men, children, and families. h&m home also manages an online shopping platform and is part of the h&m group, which is committed to sustainability and social responsibility.

avery products corporation is an american manufacturing company engaged in the production and supply of self-adhesive labels, labeling software, binders, dividers, and other office supplies. the company serves businesses, individual consumers, and educational institutions, offering products such as blank and custom labels, cards, tags, and related organizational items. avery also provides digital design tools and templates for its products. the company operates internationally and is part of ccl industries inc.

nestlé korea co., ltd., known as nespresso, is a swiss company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and distribution of espresso and coffee machines, coffee capsules, and coffee accessories. the company serves both individual consumers and business clients, including corporate cafés, hotels, restaurants, and fine dining establishments, offering professional coffee solutions and subscription services. nespresso operates a network of boutiques and points of sale, and is b-corp certified. the company also participates in capsule recycling programs and emphasizes sustainability in its operations.

produit en bretagne is a french collective network that represents and supports companies across brittany, spanning sectors such as agro-food, distribution, industry, culture, tourism, and services. the organization provides services including job placement, training, and social responsibility initiatives, and operates an online boutique offering textile and daily-use products made in france with at least one production step in brittany. produit en bretagne also organizes events such as culinary competitions and cultural festivals, and collaborates with member companies to promote local production and employment.

primary_naics.label: Plumbing Fixture Fitting and Trim Manufacturing

description: kohler new zealand limited is a new zealand company engaged in the manufacturing and retail of plumbing products and cabinetry. the company operates as a bathroom supply store and general store, offering a range of products such as baths, toilets, tapware, basins, furniture, and accessories for both residential and commercial markets. kohler also provides technical support and warranty services, and is part of the kohler kitchen and bath group, which includes a portfolio of brands and products.
industry_name: Plumbing Fixture Fitting and Trim Manufacturing

primary_naics.label: Commercial and Service Industry Machinery Manufacturing

description: hako australia pty ltd, dba hako, is an australian private company engaged in the manufacturing and supply of industrial cleaning equipment, including floor scrubbers, sweepers, and vacuum cleaners. the company also provides equipment rental, technical assistance, maintenance services, and machinery parts manufacturing. hako serves sectors such as healthcare, retail, logistics, public institutions, and education, and operates multiple branches across australia. the company is certified for environmental standards and incorporates sustainability practices in its operations.
industry_name: Commercial and Service Industry Machinery Manufacturing

description: decathlon italia s.r.l. unipersonale is an italian private company engaged in the retail and distribution of sports equipment and apparel. the company operates both physical and online stores, and provides additional services such as equipment rental, repair, maintenance, and second-hand equipment sales. decathlon also manages production, design, it, logistics, and administrative functions, and is certified in quality and environmental management. the company incorporates sustainability practices, including circular economy initiatives and eco-design, and is committed to reducing environmental impact.
core_offerings: Sustainable Sourcing and Supply Chain Solutions

description: btn de haas b.v., dba btn de haas, is a dutch agricultural wholesaler and retailer specialized in supplying products and services for the agricultural sector, including animal care supplies, veterinary products, and agricultural equipment. the company serves a broad range of clients such as dairy farmers, livestock producers, crop farmers, glasshouse and vegetable growers, tree nurseries, gardeners, contract farmers, agricultural service providers, and hobby farmers. in addition to its wholesale and retail operations, btn de haas provides advisory services, organizes seminars and webinars, and maintains a knowledge platform to support agricultural professionals.
core_offerings: Crop and Glasshouse Cultivation Supplies Retail
Tree Nursery and Garden Supplies Retail
Cleaning and Pest Control Products Retail

description: coop home goods, llc, known as coop sleep goods, is an american company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and retail of adjustable and memory foam sleep products, including pillows, sheets, comforters, mattress toppers, and bedding accessories. the company also operates as a bedding and home goods store, serving individuals, families, and healthcare providers. coop sleep goods incorporates eco-friendly materials and cooling technologies in its products and maintains an e-commerce platform.
core_offerings: Sleep Product Promotions and Newsletter Services

description: pez candy, inc., dba pez candy, is an american company specialized in the production and distribution of pez dispensers and candies. the company operates as both a manufacturer and retailer, serving a global market with products distributed through retail channels, online stores, and partnerships with retailers and distributors. pez candy also engages in the distribution of gift sets, party favors, and related merchandise. the company is committed to sustainability and ethical practices, with a focus on reducing waste and promoting eco-friendly packaging.

primary_naics.label: Motor Vehicle Gasoline Engine and Engine Parts Manufacturing

description: fce bank plc, known as ford credit, is a british financial services company engaged in automotive financing, leasing, insurance, and vehicle maintenance. the company serves both individual and business customers, including commercial vehicle customers, across the united kingdom. in addition to its financial services, ford credit operates a network of dealers and service centers, providing vehicle sales, maintenance, and related support. the company is part of the ford motor company and is authorized by the prudential regulation authority and regulated by the financial conduct authority.
industry_name: Motor Vehicle Gasoline Engine and Engine Parts Manufacturing

description: tru kids, inc., dba toys"r"us, is an american retail company specialized in toys, dolls, action figures, learning games, building blocks, and related children's products. the company serves a global market, focusing on children and families, and operates both physical stores and an online platform. toys"r"us also provides diy activities, toy reviews, and printable content to engage customers.
core_offerings: Toy Review and Product Evaluation Services
DIY Activities and Educational Content Services

description: harbor freight is an american retailer engaged in tools and equipment, operating a chain of retail stores and an e-commerce platform. the company offers a broad range of products including automotive, air and power tools, storage, outdoor power equipment, generators, welding supplies, shop equipment, and hand tools. harbor freight also provides extended service protection plans, replacement parts, and a credit card program, and is involved in community initiatives supporting schools and trades programs.
core_offerings: Tool and Equipment Quality Assurance Services

description: lululemon athletica inc. is a canadian multinational company engaged in the retail of technical apparel, athletic shoes, loungewear, and related lifestyle products. the company operates both physical stores and an online platform, serving a global market with a focus on performance apparel and footwear. lululemon also offers accessories and personal care products, and is committed to sustainability and ethical practices.

primary_naics.label: Plumbing Fixture Fitting and Trim Manufacturing

description: roca sanitario s.a.u. is a spanish company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and distribution of bathroom products, including sinks, faucets, toilets, showers, mirrors, lighting, and accessories. the company operates internationally, serving markets in over 170 countries through a network of production plants and commercial delegations. roca also provides professional services and support to architects, designers, installers, and builders, and is involved in corporate venture capital and sustainability initiatives. the company is committed to sustainability and environmental responsibility, and operates roca galleries as cultural and design spaces showcasing its products and values.
industry_name: Plumbing Fixture Fitting and Trim Manufacturing

description: aotea new zealand online limited, known as aotea wellness, is a new zealand company engaged in the retail and distribution of natural wellness products, including skincare, immune support supplements, and natural toothpaste. the company operates both physical and online stores, serving individual customers and businesses. in addition to its core retail and distribution activities, aotea wellness is involved in community initiatives and sponsorships. the company is part of a larger network of stores and brands, including aotea gifts, kapeka, and hellokiwi, which collectively offer a range of health, beauty, fashion, and destination products.

aromas pty ltd, dba aromas coffee roasters, is an australian company specialized in coffee roasting, coffee and tea wholesaling, and the supply of cafe equipment. the company serves both individual consumers and wholesale clients, including cafes and home-barista enthusiasts across australia and internationally. in addition to its core roasting and distribution activities, aromas coffee roasters provides educational resources and training programs for baristas and coffee enthusiasts.
core_offerings: Cafe and Home Barista Product Takeout Services

primary_naics.label: All Other Converted Paper Product Manufacturing

description: bbk tobacco & foods, llp, known as raw rolling papers, is an american manufacturing and distribution company engaged in plant-based rolling papers and related products for smoking cannabis and tobacco. the company also produces filters and hand-rolling machines, and is involved in medical marijuana initiatives and educational programs. raw rolling papers serves both individual smokers and retailers, with operations primarily in the united states.
industry_name: All Other Converted Paper Product Manufacturing

description: wbs mobility s.a., dba wbs mobility, is a polish company engaged in the development and operation of a nationwide network of publicly accessible fast charging stations for electric vehicles. the company also provides infrastructure services for electric vehicle charging and is involved in the renewables and environment sector, including solar electric power generation. wbs mobility serves both individual consumers and businesses seeking charging solutions in poland.

inou is a french company engaged in the production and sale of fruits, with a focus on pressing and processing these fruits into various products. the company operates in paris and serves the french market.
